entities.name: JATROPHA
entities.description: Non-edible oil plant used for bio-fuel production and rehabilitation of degraded lands

entities.name: PONGAMIA
entities.description: Non-edible oil plant used for bio-fuel production and rehabilitation of degraded lands

entities.name: TOTAL OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of oil found in the accessions of Jatropha and Pongamia

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The pod to seed ratio of Jatropha plants

entities.name: PLANT YIELD
entities.description: The amount of biomass or seed produced per plant or per hectare

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of Jatropha plantations to utilize water under various stress conditions

entities.name: EVAPO-TRANSPIRATION DEMAND
entities.description: The amount of water lost through evaporation and transpiration in Jatropha plantations

entities.name: NUTRIENT CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of nutrients, such as nitrogen, present in plant parts like leaves, shoots, and seeds

entities.name: CONSORTIUM APPROACH
entities.description: A collaborative strategy used to develop degraded common property resources and individual lands

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing multiple crops simultaneously in the same field with Jatropha and Pongamia

entities.name: NUTRIENT BUDGETING APPROACH
entities.description: A method used to calculate the nutrient requirements needed to achieve targeted yields

entities.name: FERTILIZER TREATMENT
entities.description: The application of nitrogen and phosphorus at different levels to plants

entities.name: RAIN-FED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions where water is supplied only by rainfall

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: A specific climatic region characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: NO MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: A state where plants have adequate water availability

entities.name: DEGRADED LANDS
entities.description: Lands that are not suitable for food production and require rehabilitation

entities.name: LOW-QUALITY SOIL
entities.description: Soil that is of poor quality but reasonably able to support crop growth

entities.name: FOSSIL FUEL
entities.description: Traditional carbon-based energy sources that bio-fuels aim to replace

entities.name: NON-EDIBLE OILS
entities.description: Oils derived from plants not used for food, serving as green energy sources

entities.name: BIO-FUEL STRATEGY
entities.description: A pro-poor strategy to benefit vulnerable society sections through bio-fuel development

entities.name: ORGANIC C
entities.description: Organic carbon added to the soil through fallen leaves and fixed in seeds

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research institution where the evaluation of Jatropha and Pongamia was conducted

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The specific site of ICRISAT in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted
